results.summary: Circle API authentication failed; cannot run coach sync proof.

payload.message: Your account could not be authenticated.

actions: Replace CIRCLE_API_KEY with a valid server-side token from Circle admin settings.
Re-run `npm run validate:apis` and `npm run validate:p0-rel-proof` after rotating the key.

results.summary: Real registration synced to HubSpot and linked back to app registration.
Paid registration was created and charged, but webhook status update was not observed in app.
actions: Verify Stripe webhook endpoint is active and subscribed to checkout.session.completed / payment_intent.succeeded.
Set STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET to allow signed fallback webhook replay in proof runs.

results.summary: Inngest event accepted but no workflow execution record was observed in time window.
actions: Confirm Inngest app endpoint points to /api/inngest on active deployment.
Confirm execute-workflow function is registered and healthy in Inngest dashboard.
